name: Shinina
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pitcher, combine the plain yogurt with 23 oz water and salt to taste.
2. If desired, thin the mixture with additional water.
3. Serve over ice.
Per serving: 69 calories, 4 grams protein, 5 grams carbohydrates, 4 grams fat, 2 grams saturated fat, 14 milligrams cholesterol, 52 milligrams sodium.
